project_context: Offline copy of the PLC project for an automated precious-metal acceptance kiosk with robot handling, weighing, induction melting, and XRF analysis.

remaining_cjk.explanation: The remaining CJK tree text consists only of built-in labels rendered by the Chinese KV STUDIO installation, such as Local Labels and Bookmarks. These are reference translations, not renameable project text.

offline_convert_check.diagnostic: KV STUDIO error 292 reports unterminated or otherwise invalid string operands in existing CommunicationProgram logic. Program-tree renaming did not edit ladder instructions, operands, addresses, constants, or string literals.
